name: Adriana Email Check
description: Check adriana@sagemindai.io inbox for new emails and send a summary to Telegram topic 92

execute.value:
Check adriana@sagemindai.io Gmail inbox for any new/unread emails received since the last check (or in the last 2 hours if this is the first run). For each new email, note the sender, subject, and a brief summary of the content. Then send a concise update to Telegram topic 92 via: cat <<'TEOF' | .claude/scripts/telegram-reply.sh 92
Your summary here
TEOF

If there are no new emails, do NOT send a message — only message when there's something new.

name: Salon Form Response Monitor
description: Check for new responses on the Innovations Salon intake forms (Stylist and Owner) and notify via Telegram

execute.value:
Check for new responses on the Innovations Salon & Spa intake forms using the Google Workspace MCP (user: adriana@sagemindai.io). Check BOTH forms:

1. Stylist Intake form (ID: 17mJO-vF8j5Mwj40VLvITHDLQnzR8WyghaFYG0b_z89M)
2. Owner Intake form (ID: 1eahz5PUi0lCZS40ZyUk_kEH-9yG8MGQiz-x2lVW9UpQ)

Use list_form_responses for each form. If there are ANY responses, send a summary to Telegram topic 92 (Salon Website - Castro Valley) via:
cat <<'TEOF' | .claude/scripts/telegram-reply.sh 92
Your summary here
TEOF

Include: which form got the response, respondent details, and key answers. If no new responses on either form, do NOT send a message — only notify when there's something new.

name: Justin Email Check
description: Check justin@sagemindai.io inbox for emails needing attention

execute.value:
Check justin@sagemindai.io Gmail inbox for unread emails received in the last 2 hours using the Google Workspace MCP. For each unread email:

1. Note the sender, subject, date, and a brief summary of the content
2. Classify priority: HIGH (action needed, time-sensitive, client communication), MEDIUM (FYI, newsletters with relevant content), LOW (marketing, automated notifications)

Only report HIGH and MEDIUM priority emails. Skip obvious spam, marketing blasts, and automated notifications that don't need attention.

Format your output with a brief header like "📧 Email Update" then list each email with sender, subject, and 1-line summary. Group by priority.

If there are no emails needing attention, just output "No emails needing attention."
